inputs.label: Refractive Index n_d
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index at the Fraunhofer D-line (589.3 nm), typically for yellow light.

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index at the Fraunhofer D-line (589.3 nm), typically for yellow light.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fraunhofer D-çizgisinde (589.3 nm) kırılma indisi, tipik olarak sarı ışık için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex an der Fraunhofer D-Linie (589,3 nm), typischerweise für gelbes Licht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction à la raie D de Fraunhofer (589,3 nm), typiquement pour la lumière jaune.
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de refracción en la línea D de Fraunhofer (589.3 nm), típicamente para luz amarilla.

inputs.label: Refractive Index n_F
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index at the Fraunhofer F-line (486.1 nm), blue hydrogen line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index at the Fraunhofer F-line (486.1 nm), blue hydrogen line.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fraunhofer F-çizgisinde (486.1 nm) kırılma indisi, mavi hidrojen çizgisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex an der Fraunhofer F-Linie (486,1 nm), blaue Wasserstofflinie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction à la raie F de Fraunhofer (486,1 nm), raie bleue de l'hydrogène.
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de refracción en la línea F de Fraunhofer (486.1 nm), línea azul del hidrógeno.

inputs.label: Refractive Index n_C
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index at the Fraunhofer C-line (656.3 nm), red hydrogen line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index at the Fraunhofer C-line (656.3 nm), red hydrogen line.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fraunhofer C-çizgisinde (656.3 nm) kırılma indisi, kırmızı hidrojen çizgisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex an der Fraunhofer C-Linie (656,3 nm), rote Wasserstofflinie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction à la raie C de Fraunhofer (656,3 nm), raie rouge de l'hydrogène.
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de refracción en la línea C de Fraunhofer (656.3 nm), línea roja del hidrógeno.

inputs.label: Reference Wavelength
inputs.businessContext: Wavelength for n_d measurement, default is 589.3 nm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wavelength for n_d measurement, default is 589.3 nm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: n_d ölçümü için dalga boyu, varsayılan 589,3 nm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wellenlänge für n_d-Messung, Standard ist 589,3 nm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'onde pour la mesure de n_d, par défaut 589,3 nm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de onda para la medición de n_d, por defecto 589.3 nm.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
